title: hieracium durisetum
intro: Hieracium durisetum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Hawkweed has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin irritations, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and promoting immune function. Hawkweed is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
